top_signals.title: Trump faces new Republican resistance in Congress as midterm pressures build
top_signals.summary: Multiple Republican factions have stepped forward to rebuke his war against Iran, his White House ballroom ​and his $1.8 billion "anti-weaponization" fund.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fortune advances Nico cobalt-gold project as cash hurdle looms
top_signals.summary: The company expects full land and water authorizations in the Northwest Territories within two to three months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Solar silver thrifting not enough to curb demand
top_signals.summary: Silver demand has been consistently outpacing supply for the last six years, with the Silver Institute projecting a 46.3Moz deficit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
